verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_muted
verdicts.reason: Warm muted depth, cinematic, fits downtempo vibe.

verdicts.name: scout_cool_mid_muted
verdicts.reason: Cool muted works, but slightly clinical feel.

verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_muted_2
verdicts.reason: Similar to warm muted, slightly less depth.

verdicts.name: scout_green_night_soft
verdicts.reason: Green cast feels cheap, not premium aesthetic.

verdicts.name: scout_neutral_night_soft
verdicts.reason: Neutral soft, premium feel, deep contemplative mood.

verdicts.name: scout_warm_mid_soft
verdicts.reason: Warm soft, accessible but slightly less dark.
